title: Reference-Counting Smart Pointer
description: Implement a reference-counting smart pointer (similar to shared_ptr) with proper copy/move semantics and custom deleter support.
requirements: Implement constructor, destructor with proper cleanup
Implement copy constructor and copy assignment
Implement move constructor and move assignment
Support custom deleter as template parameter
Implement get(), operator*, operator-> for access
Implement reset() and reset(T* ptr) methods

few_shot_examples.prompt: Implement a control block for reference counting.
Implement move assignment for a resource-owning class.
